query: Can you generate a 5-day travel itinerary for a group of 4, departing from Myrtle Beach and planning to visit 2 cities in Tennessee? The trip is scheduled from March 14th to March 18th, 2022, and we have allocated a budget of $5,500. We would prefer to stay in private rooms during our accommodations.

plan.transportation: F3979005 from Myrtle Beach to Nashville
plan.attraction: Country Music Hall of Fame and Museum; Johnny Cash Museum; Centennial Park;
plan.accommodation: Huge 2 Bedroom, Great Location, Express Metro, Nashville

plan.attraction: Belle Meade Historic Site & Winery; Nashville Zoo at Grassmere; Musicians Hall of Fame and Museum;
plan.accommodation: Huge 2 Bedroom, Great Location, Express Metro, Nashville

plan.attraction: Graceland; National Civil Rights Museum; Memphis Rock 'n' Soul Museum;
plan.accommodation: ~*PLANT HAVEN*~ Private Room -Charming Garden Apt, Memphis

plan.attraction: Stax Museum of American Soul Music; Memphis Botanic Garden; Memphis Museum of Science & History;
plan.accommodation: ~*PLANT HAVEN*~ Private Room -Charming Garden Apt, Memphis

plan.transportation: self-driving from Memphis to Myrtle Beach
